title: ExtSync Release Metadata
description: Signed metadata describing a single published release. The Agent verifies the Ed25519 signature over the canonical form (signature field excluded) before installing. See packages/release-schema/README.md for the canonicalization rules.

schema.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

extensionId.description: Stable Chrome extension id derived from the project public key (ADR-0005).

url.description: HTTPS URL (or presigned) to the immutable, validated artifact ZIP.

size.description: Exact byte size. Agent rejects artifacts larger than this.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the artifact bytes.

sequence.description: Monotonic per-project sequence. Agent ignores lower-or-equal sequences unless 'rollback' is true.

rollback.description: True for a signed rollback to an earlier version; allows installing a lower sequence.

rolloutPercentage.description: Deterministic rollout bucket cutoff. Device installs if bucket(projectId+deviceId) < rolloutPercentage.

permissionsChanged.description: True if permissions/host_permissions changed vs the previously published release in this channel.

requiresUserApproval.description: Computed server-side per policy (ADR/spec §15). When true the Agent must show a permission diff and not auto-install.

keyId.description: Identifies which platform public key verifies 'signature' (key rotation, ADR-0003).

signature.description: base64(Ed25519(canonical(metadata without 'signature'))). EXCLUDED from the canonical form being signed.
